What We Do

Every Angle
Covered

You should not need five agencies to tell one story. We bring strategy, creative, media, and execution under one roof so your brand shows up the same way everywhere it matters.

01🎯
Brand Strategy

We figure out what your brand actually stands for, who it is talking to, and what it needs to say to make those people stop scrolling.

02📷
Social Media

Content that does not just fill a calendar. Every post earns its place with a clear point of view and a reason for people to engage.

03🔐
Media Buying

Meta, Google, LinkedIn, TikTok. We place your money where your audience actually lives and pull it back when the numbers say to.

04📢
PR

Stories that journalists want to tell. We handle press, placements, crisis comms, and the kind of coverage that a paid ad cannot buy.

05🎥
Video Production

From quick Reels to full brand films. We script, shoot, and edit content built for the platform and the audience it is landing on.

06🎉
Events

Launches, activations, brand experiences. We handle the brief, the logistics, and the post-event content that keeps the moment alive.

07✍️
Content Marketing

Blogs, newsletters, thought leadership. Built to show up in search, earn trust, and keep your audience coming back without being asked.

08📈
Growth & Performance

Funnels, CRM, analytics, attribution. We track what is working, cut what is not, and build the systems that make growth repeatable.

09🌎
Market Entry

We build market strategies that remove the guesswork from entering a new territory. Whether you are going in for the first time or restarting after a false move, we map the path and walk it with you.

10🎉
Activations

We bring brands off the screen and into the room. Consumer activations, trade events, street marketing, and experiential campaigns that make people feel something and remember it.

Who We Are

Sharp Thinking,
Real Results

The Social Geek started in 2017 as a simple idea: brands deserve marketing that is both smart and honest. No inflated promises, no vanity metrics, no campaigns built to look good in a pitch deck but nowhere else.

  • English, French, and Portuguese capabilities for West Africa and beyond
  • Hands-on experience across Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone, and Liberia
  • Senior strategy on every account, not passed to a junior after onboarding
  • Built to work with brands anywhere in the world, remotely and effectively
Why TSG

We Are
Not Like
the Others

Most agencies will tell you what you want to hear. We would rather tell you the truth early and save you six months of budget.

🧠
We Think Before We Post

Strategy comes before content. We do not start creating until we know what your brand is trying to do and who it is trying to reach.

🌎
We Know the Markets

Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone, Liberia and beyond. Not from a case study. We have been on the ground, run the campaigns, and learned what works where.

📊
Numbers We Can Explain

No vanity dashboards. Every report ties back to something that matters to your business, reach, revenue, retention, or all three.

⚡
Fast, Flat, and Direct

You talk to the person doing the work. Approvals are quick, pivots are painless, and nothing falls between the cracks of a large team.
